# CWE-250 negative: restrictive file permissions for owner only
lang: go
file: CWE-250-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-250 Execution with Unnecessary Privileges (mitigated)
func SaveConfig(c *gin.Context) {
	path := "/etc/app/runtime.json"
	body, err := c.GetRawData()
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "body"})
		return
	}
	if err := os.WriteFile(path, body, 0o600); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "write"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "saved"})
}
